reason: The finding configures SELinux to enforcing mode, a low‑risk baseline change that can be safely applied via a scripted edit of /etc/selinux/config and a single reboot.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; Potential lockout if SELinux policy is incompatible with custom applications; Requires reboot to take effect; Relabeling of filesystems may be time‑consuming on large systems
